instructions: Fix the TCP fragmentation bug in `src/jitsu/server/ipc.py`. Update `handle_client` to read the FULL payload by iterating over the stream (`async for chunk in client: chunks.append(chunk)`), then join the bytes and decode. After queuing, use `await client.send(...)` to send `ACK: Queued {count} phases.`. If a JSON/Validation error occurs, send `ERR: <message>`.
completion_criteria: IPC server handles fragmented TCP streams and sends an ACK back.
